name: Potato and Tomato Salad
intro:
I love this simple but delicious dish. It is perfect as a light lunch because it is so simple it does depend on the quality of the tomatoes.

When you buy tomatoes (or better still, pick them in your vegetable garden), make sure they are firm and fragrant. I don’t put them in the fridge, as I find they lose a lot of flavour. Put them in a flat basket and leave them on the kitchen table. Of course the best way to have the most fragrant tomatoes is to grow your own. They are easy to grow and, together with herbs, are some of the most worthwhile ingredients to produce at home.

ingredients.item: medium potatoes, boiled, peeled and sliced
small Spanish onion, very thinly sliced
ripe tomatoes, diced, or 16 cherry tomatoes
capers in brine, drained and chopped

method: Gently combine the potato, onion, tomato, olives and capers in a large bowl.
Add the basil, oregano and oil, and toss together gently but thoroughly. Season and serve with plenty of crusty Italian bread.
